com._1c.v8.ibis.admin

Interface IResourceConsumptionLimit

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    ResourceConsumptionLimit

    public interface IResourceConsumptionLimit
    Interface of resource limit description of 1C:Enterprise server cluster

      • getAction

        int getAction()
        Gets action type
        Returns:
        • 0 - none
        • 1 - set low thread priority
        • 2 - interrupt current server call
        • 3 - terminate session

      • setAction

        void setAction(int action)
        Sets action type
        Parameters:
        action -
        • 0 - none
        • 1 - set low thread priority
        • 2 - interrupt current server call
        • 3 - terminate session
